verse.name: v1
verse.lines: From heaven you came, helpless babe entered our world, Your Glory veiled Not to be served, but to serve And give Your life, that we might live

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This is our God, the Servant King, He calls us now to follow Him, To bring our lives as a daily offering, Of worship to, the Servant King

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There in the garden of tears, My heavy load, He chose to bear, His heart with sorrow was torn, 'Yet Not my will but Yours', He said

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Come see His hand and His feet, The scars that speak of sacrifice, Hands that flung stars into space, To cruel nails surrendered

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So let us learn how to serve, And in our lives enthrone Him, Each other's needs to prefer, For it is Christ we're serving
